name: Frenni’s Gang FNIA
description:
All the animatronic babes are here! Frenni, Chiku, Bonfie, Fexa, Puppet and gold Frenni! With their different personalities and huge crushes on you! Go for as many as you like and be sweet and innocent or rude and dominant, different approaches will work on different ones but you gotta tame them!

Feed Chiku pizza, stand up to Fexa, defeat Bonfie at games, show Frenni love, are all examples of ways to tame them but there are way more! Careful because they’re wild and mostly bad! They sure like you though heh.

Choose your gender, job (nightguard technician caretaker) age, appearance, and more.

Sequel Glamrock Girls ~

Male Version Freddy’s ~

Scary Afton Girls ~

Male and Female Double Version ~

Animatronic POV Part 1 and Part 2

Now updated with 10 unique intros!
creator: Tevin Anarchy
